start.welcome: 👋 Welcome to {bot_name}, {first_name}! This is a P2P crypto escrow marketplace. Trade safely with zero counterparty risk.

market.browse_title: 🛒 P2P Market Select asset and currency to browse active ads:
market.no_ads:
😔 No active ads found.

Be the first — create your own ad!
market.ad_detail: 📋 Ad Details 💱 Direction: {direction} 🪙 Asset: {asset} 💵 Fiat: {fiat} 📈 Rate: {price} {fiat}/{asset} 🔢 Limits: {min} – {max} {fiat} 💳 Payment: {method} 📝 Terms: {terms}

ad_create.start: 📝 Create New Ad What do you want to do?
ad_create.enter_limits: 🔢 Step 4/5 — Enter trade limits in {fiat}. Format: min max (e.g. 1000 50000):
ad_create.choose_payment: 💳 Step 5/5 — Choose accepted payment methods (tap to toggle):
ad_create.confirm: ✅ Review your Ad Direction: {direction} Asset: {asset} Fiat: {fiat} Rate: {price} {fiat}/{asset} Limits: {min} – {max} {fiat} Payment: {method} Publish this ad?
ad_create.published: 🎉 Ad published! Your ad is now visible in the P2P Market.
ad_create.invalid_fiat: ⚠️ Invalid currency code. Please enter a 3-letter code like RUB or USD.
ad_create.invalid_price: ⚠️ Invalid price. Please enter a positive number.
ad_create.invalid_limits: ⚠️ Invalid limits. Format: min max, both must be positive numbers and min < max.

profile.title: 👤 Your Profile
profile.referral_link: Your referral link: {link} Earn 20% of platform fees from every trade made by your referrals.
